sentence: मुरगाव पालिकेच्या 239 लाखांच्या शिलकी अर्थसंकल्पाक मान्यताय
english_translation: Approval for Mormugao Municipality's 239 lakh surplus budget.
amr_penman:
(a / approve-01
   :ARG1 (b / budget
            :mod (s / surplus)
            :poss (m / municipality
                     :name (n / name
                              :op1 "Mormugao"))
            :cost (m2 / monetary-quantity
                     :quant 239
                     :unit (l / lakh))))

sentence: डिझेलाच्या दरांत प्रति लिटर 80 पयशांनी वाड जाल्या
english_translation: The price of diesel has increased by 80 paise per liter.
amr_penman:
(i / increase-01
   :ARG1 (p / price
             :topic (d / diesel))
   :ARG2 (m / monetary-quantity
             :quant 80
             :unit (p2 / paise)
             :per (l / liter)))

english_translation: These rates have been increased across the entire country.
The political situation is changing every moment.

sentence: नवी दिल्लीः सध्या देशांतली वाडटी म्हारगाय आनी इंधनाच्या वाडट्या दरांक लागून सर्वसामान्यांक व्हड फटको बसला
english_translation: New Delhi: Currently, the common people have been hit hard due to the rising inflation in the country and the increasing prices of fuel.
amr_penman:
(h / hit-01
   :ARG1 (p / person
            :mod (c / common))
   :cause (a / and
            :op1 (g / grow-01
                     :ARG1 (i / inflation
                              :location (c2 / country)))
            :op2 (g2 / grow-01
                     :ARG1 (p2 / price
                              :topic (f / fuel))))
   :degree (h2 / high)
   :time (n / now)
   :location (c3 / city
               :name (n2 / name
                         :op1 "New Delhi")))

sentence: वाड्या म्हारगायेच्या मुद्या वयल्यान काँग्रेस बरीच आक्रमक जाल्या
english_translation: The Congress has become very aggressive over the issue of rising inflation.
amr_penman:
(b / become-01
   :ARG1 (p / political-party
            :name (n / name :op1 "Congress"))
   :ARG2 (a / aggressive
            :degree (v / very))
   :cause (i / issue-01
             :topic (i2 / inflate-01)))

sentence: सध्या सीएनजी, पीएनजी गॅस तशेच खाद्यतेलाचे दर वाडल्यात
english_translation: Currently, the prices of CNG, PNG gas, and edible oil have increased.
amr_penman: (i / increase-01 :ARG1 (p / price :ARG1-of (a / and :op1 (g / gas :name (n / name :op1 "CNG")) :op2 (g2 / gas :name (n2 / name :op1 "PNG")) :op3 (o / oil :mod (e / edible)))) :time (n3 / now))

english_translation: The prices of medicines will also increase from April 1st.

sentence: वाडट्या म्हारगायेचो सर्वसामान्यांचे व्हड परिणाम जाल्ल्याचे दिसून येता
english_translation: The great effect of rising inflation on the common people is evident.
amr_penman:
(s / see-01
   :ARG1 (a / affect-01
      :ARG0 (i / inflation
         :ARG1-of (r / rise-01))
      :ARG1 (p / public)
      :degree (g / great)))
